CONTENT.Career: Zoukrou is a youth product of FO Plaisir and ACBB. He joined Troyes in January 2020. He made his professional debut with Troyes in a 2–1 Ligue 1 loss to Paris Saint-Germain on 7 August 2021. On 28 September 2021, he signed a professional contract with Troyes, keeping him at the club until 2024.On 1 July 2024, BSC Young Boys announced the signing of Zoukrou, on a contract until 30 June 2028.
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Zoukrou holds Ivorian and French nationalities. He was called up to the France U20s for the 2023 FIFA U-20 World Cup.

SUMMARY: Tanguy Xavier Banhie Zoukrou (born 7 May 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Young Boys.
